items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.1 mph at a 13.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Boston Red Sox, KC 1, BOS 3. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.1 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Red Sox Recap
